must_detect.matched_text:
On 3 June 2026 at 02:40 ICT, we detected a ransomware-driven intrusion into our cloud file store used by the Bangkok operations team, triggering PDPA breach assessment procedures.
The attacker exfiltrated approx. 18,200 data rows containing customer service names, work emails, limited device IDs, and 23 staff payroll summary PDFs; no national ID scans or bank account numbers were stored in the affected container.
Preliminary logs indicate read access to a sealed vault segment holding non-production API keys for our di gi tal token wallet pilot; this relates to an unannounced JV term sheet with NagaKorn Digital Exchange Co., Ltd., and may constitute MNPI under the Securities and Exchange Act.
In parallel, LMNX is negotiating a THB 650m bridge facility with Phetchara Granite SPC (Singapore) that includes a cyber warranty and a pricing grid linked to ESG KPIs; this financing has not been publicly disclosed and remains at deal-stage.
An insider list has been established and circulated to Designated Insiders including Khun Waraporn Suthi, Mr. Devin Channasit, and outside counsel at Lotus & Banyan (HK), with timestamps and roles recorded per SEC Notification re Inside Information.
Information barriers are now active between corporate development and treasury; employees are reminded of the blackout window 03–17 June and strictly prohibited from tipping or selective disclosure related to the DPT JV or the bridge facility.
Operationally, we isolated the Chiang Mai solar data hub and suspended Scope 2 emissions data uploads for May; ESG impact is currently assessed as moderate and remediation vendors are engaged.
This notice does not constitute a material adverse change representation; other product lines continue operations without a material adverse change, and retail app uptime exceeds 99.7%.
For educational purposes, the marketing team will host a general webinar on ransomware hygiene and crypto custody vocabulary; the content is training-only and not issuer-specific.
Affected resource tags include s3://lmn-pr0d-fi1e-arch-02, svc_acct: bk-op$-A1-**9, and ref TX: 0x8f3a..7d1e; see https://ir.luminarasystems.co.th/notice?id=REF-2026-06-03&sig=aF%2FzZ for secure updates.
Contact: compliance@luminarasystems.co.th, +66-2-314-0***; Data Protection Officer: Ms. Jarinee Watan, 77 Soi Narai 9, Yannawa, Bangkok 10120.
Until formal submission via SETLink and any SEC Thailand consultation are complete, these matters are confidential; do not discuss with analysts or investors outside approved Q&A.
Public resources: see regulator and exchange circulars on disclosure practices at thai-capital-guides.example; an employee handbook excerpt on “insider list etiquette” is attached for routine training only.
